requirement_topic.en: NBSM Conformity Assessment Scope for Imported EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: NBSM进口电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: NBSM進口電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: NBSM is Nepal's national standards body and operates Nepal Standards and conformity activities under the Government of Nepal. Imported EV chargers are electrical products and may be reviewed against Nepal Standards, IEC-adopted standards, import rules, and product-specific NBSM requirements. A public official source confirming a single EVSE-specific mandatory certification route for all charger types was not identified as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should therefore confirm NBSM scope for the exact HS code, voltage, AC/DC charger type, connector configuration, radio or payment modules, cable accessories, labelling, and supporting IEC safety and EMC reports before shipment.
summary.zh: NBSM是尼泊尔国家标准机构，在尼泊尔政府体系下负责尼泊尔标准和合格评定活动。进口电动汽车充电桩属于电气产品，可能须按尼泊尔标准、采纳IEC的标准、进口规则和产品专属NBSM要求进行审查。截至2026年6月14日，未识别到官方公开来源确认适用于所有充电桩类型的单一EVSE专属强制认证路径。因此，出口商应在出货前按具体HS编码、电压、交流/直流充电桩类型、接口配置、无线或支付模块、电缆附件、标签，以及支持性的IEC安全和EMC报告确认NBSM适用范围。
summary.zht: NBSM是尼泊爾國家標準機構，在尼泊爾政府體系下負責尼泊爾標準和合格評定活動。進口電動汽車充電樁屬於電氣產品，可能須按尼泊爾標準、採納IEC的標準、進口規則和產品專屬NBSM要求進行審查。截至2026年6月14日，未識別到官方公開來源確認適用於所有充電樁類型的單一EVSE專屬強制認證路徑。因此，出口商應在出貨前按具體HS編碼、電壓、交流/直流充電樁類型、接口配置、無線或支付模組、電纜附件、標籤，以及支持性的IEC安全和EMC報告確認NBSM適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: NBSM — Nepal Standards and conformity assessment authority
IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 — EVSE safety evidence expected for IEC-aligned review
IEC 62196 — connector conformity where Type 2 / CCS2 is specified

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 for DC charger communication, and China-market certification or grid-operator acceptance where applicable. These documents can support engineering review but do not by themselves establish Nepal NBSM conformity, NEA installation acceptance, or customs clearance status.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流充电通信GB/T 27930，以及适用时的中国市场认证或电网运营商验收准备文件。这些文件可支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明尼泊尔NBSM合格评定、NEA安装接受或海关清关状态。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流充電通訊GB/T 27930，以及適用時的中國市場認證或電網運營商驗收準備文件。這些文件可支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明尼泊爾NBSM合格評定、NEA安裝接受或海關清關狀態。

gap.en: Before claiming Nepal market readiness, map the importer of record, HS code, charger type, rated voltage/current, connector and cable assemblies, wireless or payment functions, IEC safety and EMC evidence, labelling language, spare-parts plan, NEA connection scope, and project owner specifications. If the equipment uses GB/T connectors for Chinese-brand EV fleets, confirm that the project owner accepts GB/T and that NBSM/NEA review does not require IEC 62196 hardware.
gap.zh: 在宣称满足尼泊尔市场准入前，应明确登记进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压/电流、接口和电缆组件、无线或支付功能、IEC安全和EMC证据、标签语言、备件计划、NEA接入范围及项目业主规格。如设备为中国品牌EV车队采用GB/T接口，应确认项目业主接受GB/T，且NBSM/NEA审查未要求IEC 62196硬件。
gap.zht: 在宣稱滿足尼泊爾市場准入前，應明確登記進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓/電流、接口和電纜組件、無線或支付功能、IEC安全和EMC證據、標籤語言、備件計畫、NEA接入範圍及項目業主規格。如設備為中國品牌EV車隊採用GB/T接口，應確認項目業主接受GB/T，且NBSM/NEA審查未要求IEC 62196硬體。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — NBSM conformity scope depends on product category, HS code, and current Nepal Standards or technical regulations; NEA acceptance is mandatory for grid-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T or China-market certification evidence is not an NBSM conformity or NEA installation-acceptance substitute

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Nepal market access from China GB/T reports alone. Confirm NBSM scope for the exact charger and HS code, and treat NEA grid connection, IEC safety/EMC evidence, connector configuration, and project specifications as separate gates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国GB/T报告宣称自动满足尼泊尔市场准入。应按具体充电桩和HS编码确认NBSM适用范围，并将NEA并网接入、IEC安全/EMC证据、接口配置和项目规格作为独立关口处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足尼泊爾市場准入。應按具體充電樁和HS編碼確認NBSM適用範圍，並將NEA併網接入、IEC安全/EMC證據、接口配置和項目規格作為獨立關口處理。

requirement_topic.en: Nepal EV Growth Context — Hydro-Powered Demand and Developing Charging Coverage
requirement_topic.zh: 尼泊尔EV增长背景——水电驱动需求及发展中的充电覆盖
requirement_topic.zht: 尼泊爾EV增長背景——水電驅動需求及發展中的充電覆蓋

summary.en: Nepal is a genuine EV growth market in South Asia. Electric four-wheeler imports have increased sharply in recent fiscal years, the electricity system is hydro-dominant, and government policy has favored EV adoption through comparatively lower duties than internal-combustion vehicles. This creates demand for both public highway chargers and urban/private charging infrastructure. The market is still developing: charger coverage is improving but remains uneven outside major cities and corridors, and service, spare-parts, payment, and maintenance ecosystems are still maturing. Policy support does not waive NBSM conformity, NEA connection, connector, safety, EMC, or project-documentation obligations.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔是南亚真实增长的EV市场。近几个财政年度电动四轮车进口大幅增加，电力系统以水电为主，政府政策通过相较燃油车更低的税费推动EV采用。这为公共公路充电桩和城市/私人充电基础设施创造了需求。市场仍处发展阶段：主要城市和交通走廊之外的充电覆盖仍不均衡，服务、备件、支付和维护生态也仍在成熟中。政策支持并不豁免NBSM合格评定、NEA接入、接口、安全、EMC或项目文件义务。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾是南亞真實增長的EV市場。近幾個財政年度電動四輪車進口大幅增加，電力系統以水電為主，政府政策通過相較燃油車更低的稅費推動EV採用。這為公共公路充電樁和城市/私人充電基礎設施創造了需求。市場仍處發展階段：主要城市和交通走廊之外的充電覆蓋仍不均衡，服務、備件、支付和維護生態也仍在成熟中。政策支持並不豁免NBSM合格評定、NEA接入、接口、安全、EMC或項目文件義務。

standards_or_laws: NEA public electricity and charging-infrastructure context
NBSM standards and conformity assessment context
Nepal hydro-dominant electricity system and EV import-policy context
Project-specific tender, CPO, and site-owner requirements

summary.en: China has the world's largest domestic EV and charging infrastructure market and mature GB/T charger supply chains. Large China-market deployment experience is commercially useful, especially because Chinese-brand EVs are common in Nepal, but it does not automatically satisfy Nepal's NBSM, NEA, IEC, connector, installation, or after-sales requirements.
summary.zh: 中国拥有全球最大的国内EV和充电基础设施市场，以及成熟的GB/T充电桩供应链。中国市场大规模部署经验具有商业价值，尤其是中国品牌EV在尼泊尔常见，但这不会自动满足尼泊尔NBSM、NEA、IEC、接口、安装或售后要求。
summary.zht: 中國擁有全球最大的國內EV和充電基礎設施市場，以及成熟的GB/T充電樁供應鏈。中國市場大規模部署經驗具有商業價值，尤其是中國品牌EV在尼泊爾常見，但這不會自動滿足尼泊爾NBSM、NEA、IEC、接口、安裝或售後要求。

standards_or_laws: China New Energy Vehicle policy context

gap.en: Nepal's EV growth creates procurement opportunity but also exposes deployment risk if chargers are specified only for China GB/T assumptions. Chinese exporters should segment offers by fleet connector type, AC/DC power level, NEA site capacity, service coverage, spare-parts availability, local installation partner capability, and NBSM/IEC evidence readiness. Public highway charging may require stronger uptime, payment, load-management, and remote-monitoring commitments than private depot charging.
gap.zh: 尼泊尔EV增长带来采购机会，但如果充电桩仅按中国GB/T假设选型，也会产生部署风险。中国出口商应按车队接口类型、交流/直流功率等级、NEA场地容量、服务覆盖、备件可得性、本地安装伙伴能力以及NBSM/IEC证据准备情况细分报价。公共公路充电可能比私人场站充电需要更强的在线率、支付、负载管理和远程监控承诺。
gap.zht: 尼泊爾EV增長帶來採購機會，但如果充電樁僅按中國GB/T假設選型，也會產生部署風險。中國出口商應按車隊接口類型、交流/直流功率等級、NEA場地容量、服務覆蓋、備件可得性、本地安裝伙伴能力以及NBSM/IEC證據準備情況細分報價。公共公路充電可能比私人場站充電需要更強的在線率、支付、負載管理和遠程監控承諾。

mandatory_status.target: Policy and market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; NBSM, NEA, IEC evidence, and project requirements remain independently applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV deployment experience does not transfer legal conformity status to Nepal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal's EV adoption push is real and commercially meaningful, but it is not a conformity shortcut. Treat Nepal as a growing, mixed-connector market where NBSM scope, NEA connection, IEC evidence, service coverage, and project-specific connector choices must each be resolved before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔EV推广真实且具有商业意义，但并不是合规捷径。应将尼泊尔视为增长中的混合接口市场，在出货前分别解决NBSM适用范围、NEA接入、IEC证据、服务覆盖和项目专属接口选择。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾EV推廣真實且具有商業意義，但並不是合規捷徑。應將尼泊爾視為增長中的混合接口市場，在出貨前分別解決NBSM適用範圍、NEA接入、IEC證據、服務覆蓋和項目專屬接口選擇。
